name: Andes Gold Corporation
summary: Andes Gold Corporation engages in the development and production of gold assets in South America. The company, through its subsidiary, Compania Minera Pl. S.A, holds interest in the Miranda Alto, a gold mining and exploration concession located in the cantons of Zaruma and Portovelo, province of El Oro, southern Ecuador. It also produces silver from the mine. The company was formerly known as Princeton Consulting and Services Corp. and changed its name to Andes Gold Corporation in July 2009. Andes Gold Corporation was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Boca Raton, Florida. As of October 1, 2010, Andes Gold Corporation operates as a subsidiary of New World Gold Corporation.
